inputs.note: Only T2/U10/V10 have predeclared diagnostic tolerances from retained case JSON.

ranked_root_cause_hypotheses.evidence: 31 audited static fields are not exact across checked leads; largest: C2H max 9.500e+04, C2F max 9.500e+04, C4F max 2.678e+04, C4H max 2.674e+04, HGT max 228.129, RDN max 161.674.
ranked_root_cause_hypotheses.hypothesis: WRF vertical-coordinate / grid-metric payload mismatch is the first root-cause target.
ranked_root_cause_hypotheses.next_probe: Diff DycoreMetrics/GridSpec against CPU wrfinput or CPU wrfout before any timestep, then rerun this envelope after the metric payload is exact.

ranked_root_cause_hypotheses.evidence: 3D wind RMSE U=4.61, V=5.83; PSFC RMSE=525; surface wind RMSE U10=2.07, V10=2.52.
ranked_root_cause_hypotheses.hypothesis: Pressure-gradient / mass-wind coupling in the dycore is the leading operator-level suspect.
ranked_root_cause_hypotheses.next_probe: Instrument first-timestep MU/P/PH pressure-gradient tendencies and U/V updates against WRF savepoints.

ranked_root_cause_hypotheses.evidence: SWDOWN RMSE=113, GLW RMSE=25.6, COSZEN RMSE=0.0401, T2 RMSE=0.994; T2 bias=-0.05091370028285012.
ranked_root_cause_hypotheses.hypothesis: Radiation or surface-energy diagnostics are a secondary amplifier of T2/TSK/PBL divergence.
ranked_root_cause_hypotheses.next_probe: Keep radiation diagnostics in the next proof gate, but do not fix them before the first-step wind/mass budget is isolated.
